title: Finances of Foreign Direct Investment Companies, 2024-25
description: Today, the Reserve Bank released the data1 relating to financial performance of non-government non-financial (NGNF) foreign direct investment (FDI) companies in India during 2024-25 (https://data.rbi.org.in/#/dbie/reports/Statistics/Corporate%20Sector/Finances%20of%20FDI%20Companies) based on audited annual accounts of 3,100 companies, which reported in the Indian Accounting Standards (Ind-AS) format for three accounting years from 2022-23 to 2024-25. Their economic sector classification is base
